Source: Vertex AI API Reference
URL: https://cloud.google.com/vertex-ai/docs/reference
Fetched: 2026-03-19

# Vertex AI API Reference

## SDKs
- Python SDK (google.cloud.aiplatform, vertexai.language_models)
- Client libraries: C#, Go, Java, Node.js

## REST API
- v1 (stable) and v1beta1 (preview)

## CLI
- gcloud ai and gcloud beta ai commands

## Key API Categories
- Model operations: endpoints, predictions, batch jobs, deployment monitoring
- Data management: datasets, feature stores, feature groups
- Training: pipelines, hyperparameter tuning, custom jobs, NAS
- Vector Search: indexes and index endpoints
- RAG Systems: RAG corpora, files, contexts, retrieval
- Notebooks: execution, runtime templates
- Advanced (v1beta1): model monitors, example stores, extensions, reasoning engines
